user_id.description: User ID to add as owner
user_id.title: User Id

CharacterUpsert.description:
Request model for creating or updating a character.

Attributes:
    novel_id: The ID of the novel this character belongs to.
    idx: Character index/number within the novel (must be >= 1).
    title: Character name or title.
    character_summaries: Brief character summaries.
    character_synopses: Detailed character synopses/background.
    language_code: Language code for character content (e.g., "en", "zh").
CharacterUpsert.title: CharacterUpsert
